mapper.select: SELECT a.* ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_feedback_question WHERE FB_IDX=a.IDX AND QT_TYPE=0) QT_TYPE0_CNT ,(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t_feedback_question WHERE FB_IDX=a.IDX AND QT_TYPE!=0) QT_TYPE1_CNT FROM t_feedback a WHERE IDX=#{idx}
SELECT a.* FROM t_feedback_question a WHERE a.FB_IDX=#{fbIdx} ORDER BY a.QT_IDX
SELECT a.* FROM t_feedback_choice a WHERE a.FB_IDX=#{fbIdx} AND a.QT_IDX=#{qtIdx} ORDER BY a.CH_IDX
SELECT a.FB_IDX,a.QT_IDX,a.CH_IDX ,COUNT(*) AS_CNT FROM t_feedback_answer a where a.EDU_SEQ=#{eduSeq} and a.FB_IDX=#{fbIdx} group by a.FB_IDX,a.QT_IDX,a.CH_IDX ORDER BY a.FB_IDX,a.QT_IDX,a.CH_IDX

SELECT a.FB_IDX,a.QT_IDX,a.CHOICE ,COUNT(*) AS_CNT FROM t_feedback_answer a WHERE a.EDU_SEQ=#{eduSeq} and a.FB_IDX=#{fbIdx} AND QT_IDX=#{qtIdx} AND CHOICE=#{chIdx} AND FE_SEQ = #{feSeq} GROUP by a.FB_IDX,a.QT_IDX,a.CHOICE ORDER BY a.FB_IDX,a.QT_IDX,a.CHOICE

select * from t_feedback_answer where EDU_SEQ=#{eduSeq} and fb_idx=#{fbIdx} and qt_idx=#{qtIdx} and fe_seq = #{feSeq} and ((choice=0 and answer is not null and replace(answer,' ','') != '') or (choice!=0)) order by reg_time

select count(*) from ( select a.fb_idx ,a.qt_idx ,b.choice from t_feedback_question a left join (select * from t_feedback_answer where edu_seq=#{eduSeq} and fb_idx=#{fbIdx} and user_id=#{userId}) b on a.fb_idx =b.fb_idx and a.qt_idx =b.qt_idx where a.fb_idx = #{fbIdx} and a.qt_type in (1,3) ) a where a.choice is null or a.choice = 0

/** 관리자 > 설문 > 연결설문 리스트 */ SELECT a.* ,b.title ,c.reg_de fe_result_reg_de,c.state fe_result_state ,(select user_nm from t_user_info where user_id = a.reg_id) reg_nm FROM t_feedback_edu a inner join t_feedback b on a.fb_idx = b.idx left join (select * from t_feedback_edu_result where edu_seq = #{eduSeq} and user_id = #{userId}) c on a.fe_seq = c.fe_seq where 1=1 and a.edu_seq = #{eduSeq} ORDER BY a.start_de
LIMIT #{firstIndex},#{rowCnt}
/** 만족도조사 게시판 카운트 */ SELECT COUNT(a.idx) FROM t_feedback a where 1=1
